texts.desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can banish any number of Traps from your GY; banish that many cards on the field. During the End Phase: You can target up to 2 "Asutra" monsters and/or "Asutra" Traps in your GY and/or banishment; for each of them, add it to your hand or Set it, then if you targeted 2 cards, return this card to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Asutraja Susanoo" once per turn.
texts.name: Asutraja Susanoo
